text: An eighty-five year old lady has fallen down a flight of stairs. You suspect spinal injury and decide to put the patient on a spineboard. You should be aware that:

options.text: It may be difficult to fit a cervical collar.
Spinal curvature may make it difficult and uncomfortable to put the patient on the board.
A K.E.D. is better for this patient.
Because of her age, she may be more prone to vomitting.
